title: App Settings - General - Account - Log in
scenario: User can log into their account via App Settings > General > Account and see Name and Email fields populated correctly with Share data option hidden
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
5. Enter valid user credentials (email and password) and authenticate.
6. Observe the "Your account" screen that appears after successful login.
expected: The "Your account" screen displays the user's Name and Email fields populated correctly. The "Share data" option is not visible.
